comment.body: what I've learned over time is macro takes time to incubate. it's best to decouple a macro theory from what we see in 2 hrs of trading. these econ reads are just binary gambling events...market has to respond to positioning first (hedges unwind, etc.) before the story starts to emerge.

comment.body:
Thanks for the “Don’t trade today” warning.  Closed my NDX call spreads this morning I put on AH yesterday and nothing else on indices. It’s messy out there.

Took a 1/3 size Sep 300P in CVNA at open, TD9 last week on the weekly, plus a whole host of other bearish technicals.  Chanos being short doesn’t hurt, but his track record is mixed.  Targeting $318 and then $294.
comment.raw_body:
Thanks for the “Don’t trade today” warning.  Closed my NDX call spreads this morning I put on AH yesterday and nothing else on indices. It’s messy out there.

Took a 1/3 size Sep 300P in CVNA at open, TD9 last week on the weekly, plus a whole host of other bearish technicals.  Chanos being short doesn’t hurt, but his track record is mixed.  Targeting $318 and then $294.

comment.body: The upper line is a strong resistance zone after 1 pm, can be broken only if volatility declines steeply, but overall the vol crush is suppressive in this regime. If vol catches up, spot is pushed upward even towards 6085 (because negative vanna makes dealers shorter delta if vol catches up).
